title: Skadoosh
description: Adds a new type of mining tool to the game: Hammers.
body:
Skadoosh is a simple mod that **adds vanilla-styled hammers**, allowing you to clear out large areas of land and fight mobs with power.

### Features

- Adds **8 new hammers** using the vanilla material types
- Hammers break a **3x3x1 area** when mining the center block. Based on the side of block you mine.
- Hammers have a **slower mining speed than pickaxes**.
- Hammers can also be **used as a weapon**, having high damage and slow attack speed.

### Planned Features

- New **custom enchantments** for the hammer, such as a depth enchantment that increases the depth of the mined area.

### Other

- **Give suggestions**! My username is "**wintooo**" on Discord.
- If you notice any problems, message me! The mod was created very quickly so there might be a few!

### Credits

Lots of help by **Kaupenjoe** on Youtube! Check him out! [See his Youtube here..](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCbzPhyLcO8VP25dZ7kaUyAw)
